title.rendered: Suzie + Rey | The Forge Miami Beach Engagement

content.rendered: If you live in South Florida, during this time of the year, you know these two words when you hear them: MIAMI SPICE. What does that have to do with this session?  We got to shoot nonetheless in one of their featured restaurant: The Forge. Time to bring it back to the pearls and the vests, Suzie and Rey definitely put on their “fancy shoes” for this one. They were almost as excited as we were to shoot some pictures in their historic v.i.p. wine cellar. You can only go in there on a private tour, Rey pulled some strings and managed to get us all in there, needless to say we loved it. Brought our senses back to Chianti, Italy. We teased these two with only one picture and they begged us for more. Finally, here they are! Enjoy some of our favorites:

content.rendered: It was an amazing afternoon we spent with Danay and Joshua! The have an awesome personality and are always smiling and happy, just how we like it! hehe..They are also VERY lucky, because they will be getting married in Dominican Republic this month!! Wish we could go!  We wish you guys the very best on everything! You rocked the session =)

title.rendered: Brittany + Travis | The Addison Boca Raton Wedding

content.rendered: During this not-so-bad hurricane season, it would decide to rain on Brittany and Travis wedding day! You might remember these high school sweet-hearts from their engagement session back in April. Well, rain or shine, they tied the knot! Nothing could stop these two from enjoying their big day. Even though we couldn’t take advantage of the outdoors, we enjoyed working in the beautiful indoors of the Addison. Let these pictures speak for themselves and tell you their happy ending. Enjoy some of our favorites:

title.rendered: Tracy + Matt | Deerfield Beach Engagement Session

content.rendered: Tracy and Matt are such a cute couple, they’ve been dating for a few years now and decided to get married next month in New York! But first, they couldn’t leave without some shots to take back home. It was so awesome for us to only drive 10 minutes to get to Deerfield Beach  from our place (what a nice change). But it was even better when we got there and saw the amazing day Florida decided to give us! (Thank you sunny Florida, you always have the most amazing skies, lol!) Enjoy some of our favorites from the day. Tracy and Matt we wish you guys the very best on your wedding and future married life! We love it!

title.rendered: Dolores + Claudio | Coral Gables Anniversary

content.rendered: It’s not everyday I get to post about my own family, so this is cool! A couple of weeks ago we celebrated my parent’s 30th anniversary at la Jolla Ballroom in Coral Gables. Even though we didn’t worked that day because we really wanted to just enjoy, seat down and relax that day we could’t help ourselves to take some quick snapshots of the party. Enjoy some of our favorites! Mom and dad…I love you!!!! Happy anniversary!!!

title.rendered: Aviva + Patrick | Key Biscayne Bill Baggs After Wedding Session

content.rendered: So we recently posted this wonderful couple’s wedding  that took place at the Rusty Pelican. But those pictures just weren’t enough for Aviva and Patrick, they wanted more and more…so we got to go again to one of our client’s favorite places here in sunny south Florida, nothing more and nothing less than the Bill Baggs State Park. At their after wedding session, Aviva rocked her dress once again one last time, and Patrick just couldn’t get enough of staring at his lovely bride. Congratulations one more time to you guys! Enjoy some of our favorites:

title.rendered: Aviva + Patrick | The Rusty Pelican Wedding

content.rendered: Rain rain go away…This should be the title for this last Sunday’s wedding. Despite the rainstorm that was coming our way at the beautiful Rusty Pelican in Key Biscayne, Aviva and Patrick still got married in the beautiful terrace with the amazing Miami skyline views. We have to say she’s a champ for taking a few drops in her wedding gown and proceeding with the ceremony. Despite the crazy weather, she got what she dreamed of on her special day! This wedding was a particular one since we got married in the same exact place! We got to relive our memories from almost 3 years ago. We just love the Rusty Pelican and taking pictures there since it’s so special to us. Enjoy some of our favorites from this party rocking couple:

content.rendered: We can only describe this wedding with one simple word: FUN! From the moment people entered the reception room at the beautiful historic Maxwell room was non-stop dancing, laughs and good times! You might remember these two from their engagement session we did not too long ago at the Gold Coast Railroad Museum. Kelly and Jared, we wish you guys all the best in this new adventure you just started. You guys are perfect for each other!

She started getting ready at the Marriott hotel, after the ceremony we took some cool group pics but what we loved the most was the beautiful scenery at the Hillcrest Country Club, where the reception took place. We got some awesome shots of lots and lots of green! Their party was great everyone had an awesome time…they even had the great grandmother dancing! Let these pictures speak for themselves and enjoy some of our favorites:

title.rendered: Europe | Travel photography

content.rendered:
We wanted to post these pictures since the moment we landed from our awesome trip to Italy, Paris and London! It was VERY hard to choose from so many nice ones!! But we did it! It’s still a very long post, lol but I hope you enjoy it!! We certainly did =)

You’ll see some Venice, Verona, Lake Garda, Florence, Amalfi, Positano, Ravello, Castello di Spessa, Chieti, Chianti, Paris & London.

She was soooo tiny!!

In europe everybody’s born with this amazing talent to park! LOL

Italo driving on the other side of the road AND stick-shift!!  CRAZY!!

Coming back home in style! Business class is AMAZING!!!!

title.rendered: Katia + Matteo | Italy after wedding session

content.rendered: And here’s the last Italy wedding post we’ll do for a while. It was SOOO hard to choose the pictures for this post! There are so many beautiful ones! We tried to narrow it down to some of our favorites. While taking the pictures we couldn’t believe how lucky we were to be shooting in Italy to a beautiful couple that were nothing but sweet, we love working with people like these two, so down to earth and friendly, they made our job so easy and fun! Hope you enjoy this session as much as we did. Katia e Matteo, a stato un piacere lavorare con voi, siete una coppia bellisima! Auguiri!

title.rendered: Katia + Matteo | Abruzzo, Italy Wedding

content.rendered: When they said “come to Italy for our wedding” we said YES!  We really had been missing Italy for a while, and it’s so good to be back in this beautiful part of the Adriatic Coast. Not only did we enjoy shooting this wedding but we got to pig out. If you didn’t know, Italian weddings last from noon to midnight and you get tons and tons of delicious home-made traditional plates, so it’s hour after hour of eating and partying. This is by far one of our biggest posts! We couldn’t contain our clicks shooting this beautiful couple. You may already know these faces from their engagement session, well, here they are now officially MARRIED! Katia e Matteo: auguri auguri e tanti più auguri ancora! Enjoy our mega post, stay tuned for their after session.

title.rendered: Angela + John | Vizcaya Engagement Session

content.rendered:
This E session was almost a live proposal! Let us tell you the story: John and Angela flew all the way from New York to celebrate their engagement. He was planning on proposing during the trip! Too bad Angela figured something was up and John had to jump to plan B, proposing back home. The good thing is she said yes! They are such a wonderful, dynamic and fun couple to work with! The day was gorgeous, but Florida doesn’t give out sunny days for free. John had to suffer in his long sleeve shirt and tight jeans, but he didn’t mind. Angela, on the other hand, had it easy: she rocked her summer dress and awesome shoes like a true fashionista! It was literally a walk in the park for her. Enjoy their mini adventure in Vizcaya, here are some of our favorites!

Photography by: Alessandro (our awesome associate photographer)

title.rendered: Tiffany + Alan | Hollywood Beach Maternity Session

content.rendered:
So what to expect when you’re expecting?…A big beautiful belly! Tiffany and Alan came all the way from Kentucky to stay a weekend in beautiful sunny Florida and spend some one-on-one time together. They wasted no time in enjoying these last moments together before baby Olyvia makes the pop! Oh yes, and to capture the last belly shots. We present to you our first “baby bump” session, enjoy some of our favorites!

Photography by: Alessandro (our awesome associate photographer)

Congrats to the new parents Tiffany and Alan! Here they are:

title.rendered: Katia + Matteo | Engagement session in Italy

content.rendered: We’ve been wanting to post this one for so long! It’s finally here! Let us introduce to you to Katia and Matteo. Last year they hired us to do their wedding in Italy, you can only imagine how thrilled we were about the idea of going there. Once we got there we realized it was going to be impossible to get a single bad shot of these two, not only because every scenery its breathtaking but also because they were total naturals! For this engagement session we started the day the Pescara bride were some time ago the olympics were held at and after we walked downtown and finished at a beautiful park. Hope you enjoy this beautiful session as much as we did!! Katia e Matteo, tanti auguri! Siamo veramente felici per voi! =)

title.rendered: Grace + Bill | Riverside Hotel Anniversary

content.rendered:
It’s not every day that you find two people that fell in love 60 years ago STILL in love today! No, it’s not common at all, yet not impossible because we found them! Grace and Bill are an inspiration not only to their family and grandkids but to us. We hope to be just like them and celebrate endless anniversaries yet to come. We wish these pictures make you relive their big celebration of love. Happy Anniversary to Bill and Grace! Here are some of our favorites!

Photography by: Alessandro (our awesome associate photographer)

title.rendered: Patricia + Alex | Gold Coast Railroad Engagement Session

content.rendered:
What a fun engagement session at the Gold Coast Railroad Museum with this ready-for-modeling soon-to-be-married couple: Patricia and Alex. They have one of the most unique love-stories we’ve ever heard: the scar that scored his wife! Yes, the moment Alex went up to talk to her, she played a little hard to get, even though  she was struck by him the moment she saw him and his endearing scar. Ever since then, these two lovebirds have been together. You can say they are both heroes: he’s a firefighter, she works with children…clearly she has the far more dangerous job 😉

They are super-fun peeps who love partying with their friends, they’re looking forward to having a totally chill time at their wedding, stay tuned tuned for the big day! In the meantime, enjoy some of our favorites.

Photography by: Alessandro (our awesome associate photographer)

title.rendered: kate + tamas | delray beach wedding

content.rendered: We love cheese, wine, and weddings.  These are among our top favorite things in life.  Kate and Tamas got married in a beautiful mansion in Delray Beach, and we cannot begin to describe the words “amazing.. beautiful.. spectacular.. sensational…” Literally, our jaws dropped when we first saw the gorgeous view this beautiful palace had to offer.  You don’t get married every day in a castle, on the beach, with your closest peeps and not to mention the beautiful Florida weather.  We absolutely loved their wedding, and sincerely hope to show you cool stuff in this post.  Here are some of our favorites…

content.rendered: We LOVE to see when two people are perfect for each other. And that was the case of Brittany and Travis! What an awesome morning we had with them! We went to take pictures exactly where everything started, their high school. They’ve been together for 8 years now and look so happy! We started the session on the baseball field were they used to play and ended on the hallway in front of their classroom. We had so much fun! Can’t wait to their wedding! Enjoy some of our favorites from they day.

title.rendered: The Scovino Family | Key Biscayne Bill Baggs Family Session

content.rendered:
I (Ale) used to work with Kathy and Francisco back when my photography was just my side job. I remember that we’ve been planning to do a family session for that long! We finally did it! It was so much fun to work with all of them, they made it so easy for us and we just fell in love with Francesca and Valentina, they were always laughing and playing around. It felt like we were just shooting a Sunday family fun day instead of working. You guys have a beautiful family! Thanks for the good times 😉

For this shoot we went to Key Biscayne, all the way down to Bill Baggs park. Here are some of our favorites from the day. Enjoy!!

title.rendered: Bessy + Justin | The Biltmore Engagement Session

content.rendered: Bessy has to be one of our most enthusiastic clients. She’s been planning this session for a long time and we were all excited to work with them! She decided to do their session at the beautiful Biltmore Hotel in Coral Gables, because they have a lot of cool stuff, and most importantly, a golf course where Justin plays.  We must say, we were really impressed with how he plays!  We, on the other hand, sucked a little bit (well, a lot!) but it was a lot of fun hitting those balls for the first time.  We always thought golfing was so easy, it turns out we were wrong.  Congratulations to the both of you, you make a beautiful couple!

title.rendered: Jennifer + Danny | Miami Beach Botanical Garden Wedding

content.rendered: We couldn’t meet Jennifer and Danny before their wedding day, but they sounded so cool and fun over the phone and they had so many wonderful ideas for the day that we had no doubt it was going to be an awesome wedding full of awesome people. We weren’t wrong! The wedding was a total success. We stared the day at the beautiful Viceroy hotel in Brickell where they were getting ready, and ended at the Miami Beach Botanical Garden where they did their ceremony and celebrated with a beautiful reception.  It truly was a beautiful day! We wish you guys the best of the best on your marriage! Enjoy a few of our favorites shots of the day.

title.rendered: Cancun | Travel Photography

content.rendered: White sandy beaches, crystal clear turquoise waters,  scuba diving, snorkeling, LOTS of water sports, delicious Mexican cuisine, awesome nightlife and picturesque markets…We could only be talking about Cancun! Really really LOVED everything about this place specially the people, they are so friendly and everybody makes you feel welcome! We went to a tour that took us to Tulum, an ancient city in ruins and to Xel-Ha, a beautiful park full of wild birds and tropical fishes. We got to see the most amazing things underwater and go under caves! Here are some of our favorite shots from the trip. Enjoy!

title.rendered: the bosque family | gold coast railroad museum family portrait

content.rendered: What a treat was to shoot this beautiful family! this was the first time we do a family session, a bit different from the engagement and wedding work but SO MUCH FUN!!  Claudia and Felix will be celebrating next month their 20th anniversary! And decided to do a retro themed session mixed with some park-beach action! We started the day at the Gold Coast Railroad Museum and then headed to the Matheson Hammock Park. We realized the we definitely love working with kids, specially when they are so nice, funny and charismatic like Brandon and Danny. We also loved the awesome dynamic and connection this family has. Congratulations Claudia and Felix for the beautiful marriage and family you two have! Have a happy 20th anniversary!!!

title.rendered: leonor + sergio | wynwood art district engagement session

content.rendered: Downtown Miami is always full of surprises, and this session taught us that doing extensive research can find you lots of artsy treasures, beautiful sceneries and amazing nightlife.  All the props go to Sergio and Leonor for making this happen, we love their enthusiasm, attention to detail and the awesome locations they chose.  First off, we started in Margaret Pace Park, where they had a beautiful picnic all set up!  Then we moved to the all-time amazing walls of Wynwood Art District, where we found some cool couches and paintings, and a special thanks goes to Caffeina Lounge in Wynwood for letting us use their facility to finish our day.  Can’t wait to their wedding, you guys look so happy together, thank you for making us part of your day, can’t wait to witness your I do’s!

title.rendered: everglades holiday park | travel photography

content.rendered: Some friends from Italy came to Florida, so we decided to take them to the Everglades, since we’ve heard so many wonderful things about this place. It was truly amazing! We’ve lived here for so long and never experienced anything like this. We got to see some huge alligators and beautiful wild birds and we even touch a mini alligator! If you ever come to Florida, beside to go to the beautiful beaches this is definitely a MUST see! Enjoy!

content.rendered:
Today’s engagement session was really unique. It’s the first time we do an actual session in a movie theater, and this is no ordinary one! The Miami Beach Cinematheque is an artsy upscale theater, where they show only independent films, highly recommended by these two movie lovers.  We’re very happy with the outcome of the session, Nadine and Ariel made our day lots of fun and they’re really great people with loving personalities.  We love it when clients take us to new places never discovered, it makes our job very exciting!

Working our butts off…that’s how we roll!

They had friends and family coming from Italy and Canada to witness their beautiful wedding at the Eden Roc Renaissance in Miami Beach. We were afraid that it was going to continue raining the whole day, but fortunately the skies cleared up allowing us to get some nice outside pictures, thank you Florida!

If you’ve ever been to an Italian wedding expect nothing less than great food, lots of dancing and tons of fun! Enjoy the post!

title.rendered: a day in las vegas | travel photography

content.rendered:
We enjoyed this trip so much! It was our first time in Vegas and surely it won’t be the last. We stayed at the Bellagio, in a suite with spectacular views to the beautiful Bellagio fountain, Paris and Eiffel Tower..so romantic! (see first picture). Our favorite show was Cirque Du Soleil “O”, probably the most dramatic water show we’ve ever seen. If you go to Vegas, you HAVE to see it! And if you’re looking for a thrilling experience, check out the rides they have at the Stratosphere Tower. You’ll be hanging off the air at 182 stories high…crazy!! Enjoy the post!

Views from the Bellagio suite

Inside a mall across the Bellagio (so cool right?)

The Venetian

Excalibur

New York in Vegas

Ale’s favorite part (of course), Gucci and Louis Vuitton in the Vegas strip

Paris and Eiffel tower at night on the Vegas strip

The Bellagio water show

 This the stratosphere. Italo almost fainted while going up. Its 1,149 feet high!

This is the view of the “vegas strip” from the Stratosphere tower

title.rendered: Michelle + Oscar | The Biltmore – Renaissance Wedding

content.rendered: Hands down, this is one of our most awesome wedding of the year. We were particularly very excited to take pictures of Michelle and Chacho’s (as his friends call him) wedding looking back at their vintage engagement session. We started their getting ready pictures at the Biltmore Hotel in Coral Gables, following their ceremony and then reception at the Renaissance hotel in Miami. She had an amazing dress and stunning looks, without leaving Oscar behind with his charming ways and love they have for each other. To top it off, we got to see ten of our past clients, which made us feel so excited. Time flies by so fast, as it feels it was only yesterday they got married. Congratulations to Michelle & Oscar for tying the knot, and welcome to the best stage of your new lives together!

title.rendered: aruba | travel photography

content.rendered:
After a looong wedding season, vacations were very much needed. If you are planing your honeymoon and have no idea were to go, well let us give you a hand…ARUBA!! From the crystal clear turquoise waters to the white sandy beaches, this unbelievable 20-mile long island is a place you’ll never forget. Being that we wanted pure relaxation, we selected an adult only hotel – the Marriott Renaissance Marina. What really caught our attention is the private island the hotel has to offer. With a 10 minute boat ride, we were sent off to paradise. But we had to explore the entire island, so we rented a Jeep (Ale’s dream) and drove around the entire island in a day. What a blast! The island people were so nice to guide us through directions, and you’ll be pleased to know they speak just about any language you speak – 7 to be exact. Our most favorite spot in the island was Baby Beach – where ultra-clear warm waters mesmerized our eyes. This is where inspiration kicked in, and we were able to capture what is the biggest panoramic print we’ve ever done – almost 10 feet long!

So here’s the great news we’ve been talking about for the past few weeks. Ready? Since Aruba and starting today, we will take one shot of each place that we travel to that is worth to give you that “gasp” feeling and will add it to our newest line of products – panoramic prints. Starting today, you can order our favorite picture or almost any travel picture in a panoramic canvas, sizes ranging from 3 to 10 feet wide (and counting!). More information coming soon. Enjoy the post!

The view from our hotel

title.rendered: ashley + brad | university of miami engagement session

content.rendered: We were heading to UM  and a HUGE storm caught us on the way. We were so worried that this was going to ruin our session, but luckily we live in south Florida! In one second you can have the perfect storm, and the next you’re enjoying the most beautiful day at the beach. As soon as we arrived the storm cleared up and we got the perfect day to shoot! Ashley and Brad both flew from Chicago to their hometown, Miami to take their engagement pictures. They met at the University of Miami and it was very special for them having their pictures taken here while remembering all of the things they did together. We had so much fun with them! Can’t wait to their wedding day!

content.rendered: Ahhh perfect wedding days…How much we love them!!! Tiffany has to be the most detail orientated bride we have ever gotten, this wedding was perfection from beginning to end.  We started the day at the Seagate Hotel in Delray where we took Tiffany’s getting ready pictures, following the first look pictures at the Delray beach club. Everyone flew in from Utah and traveled from other places in the world to witness their beautiful destination wedding. You know that everybody loves the bride and groom when you have more than 8 toasts in a row! And we absolutely loved the romantic meal we got in a private dining restaurant with a personal singer and delicious food!! Many thanks to the bride, groom and family for making this experience so thoughtful and fun for us.

title.rendered: Tiffany + Brendan | Engagement Session

content.rendered:
It’s officially our last session of last year and the first post of this year! Tiffany and Brendan flew from Utah this past week to have their engagement session at Miami Beach. It was challenging knowing that she’s an artist, but at the same time they were very easy going and lots of fun to work with. Enjoy!

:: More pictures coming to the Print Store soon ::

title.rendered: Pablo | Welcome Back Party

content.rendered:
This was an unforgettable party. It was a celebration of Pablo, who survived a major car accident and lived to tell the story. He was in a coma for several days, and his father promised that if his son survived, he would throw a mega party for all of those who were there to support him and his family. Well, he certainly came through with his promise, and held a huge party at CB Smith Park with lots of fun stuff and rides. We’re very happy to see you back on your feet and wish you the very best in life!

:: More pictures coming soon on the Print Store ::

title.rendered: Janicel + Matias | Trash-the-dress After Wedding Session

content.rendered:
Trash the dress…anyone? Yesss!! We finally got someone to do it! And not just anyone, our new sister in law! We had a blast taking pictures of these newlyweds in the beautiful north miami beach area. As most of you know by now, we love to get dirty, on the sand in the mud in the water…and my silly husband, for the SECOND time, got in the water with his brand new iPhone 4. You may recall this same incident only happened 2 months ago with Khadine & Dwayne’s engagement, where he had the perfect excuse to upgrade his dead iPhone 3GS. But gladly, everything turned out to be ok this time and we’re just glad he didn’t drop the camera in the water! Much love and happiness to Janicel & Matias for their new marriage! Congratulations!!!

content.rendered:
We had tons of fun taking pictures of Lea and Claudio, who flew out of state from Massachusetts for the engagement session in Miami at the Vizcaya Museum and Gardens. It was great meeting Lea’s parents, and as you will see in the very end, Lea’s dad approved the set! Hope you enjoy these as much as we did!

title.rendered: Ruth + Joel | Miami Wedding

content.rendered:
The last couple of weeks have been extra busy for us. Busy season, 1 year anniversary celebration in Las Vegas, tons of editing, etc…And here it is! You may remember Ruth and Joel on their fantastic engagement session at Miami’s South Pointe park. We were very happy to see them again on their wedding day. Congrats guys!

title.rendered: Christy + Manny | South Florida Bridal Party

content.rendered:
We had the opportunity to meet Christy and Manny a few months ago, and are very excited to be doing their wedding soon next year. This was an intimate engagement party with lots of really good homemade paella, dancing, close family and friends. We can’t wait to do their engagement session, rumors are we’ll be doing it at a private airport. Stay tuned!

title.rendered: Odalys + David | South Florida Engagement Session

content.rendered: It’s pretty often that we get couples asking to take pictures on our backyard as you can see on our blog. We were starting to wonder why, but after this session we fell in love again with our backyard and realized how awesome and how blessed we are to live in such a beautiful place. The day was ultra windy, but we managed to make the best out of it! First, we got Odalys and David wet on the pier (sorry Odalys!). Then we took them to the Haulover Marina Park where an awesome dude took us on his mega yacht, and we finished the day with a breathtaking sunset. We had so much fun with you guys and we can’t expect anything less for your wedding!

title.rendered: Khadine + Dwayne | Miami Wedding

content.rendered: We feel so fortunate to have such an awesome job, where we get to meet awesome couples, eat awesome food, dance awesome music and have good times. This time was not an exception. Khadine and Dwayne had one of the most fun wedding we’ve been to so far. Their ceremony and reception was held on north Miami beach at the Newport Beachside hotel. It was a very intimate wedding, with lots of emotions and tons of dancing! And WOW, these people can dance!!!

content.rendered: Khadine and Dwayne flew from New York last week to have their engagement session in the turquoise waters of Miami beach. They are doing a destination wedding here next month, we can’t wait!

title.rendered: Janel + Esteban | Kendall Wedding

content.rendered:
This is our biggest post yet! It was really hard to choose so we ended up with more than 60 pictures for the blog. We had SOOO much fun at this wedding!! What made it really special is the fact that they’re really good old friends of ours. The wedding ceremony was in Weston and the reception was held at The Reception Palace in Kendall. We’re so happy we got to take pictures of your special day for you guys. Hope you enjoy these pictures as much as we did!

title.rendered: Mayra + Chris | Engagement Session

content.rendered:
Another beautiful South Florida sunrise session. You can’t really get over them! We got a chance to take pictures of Mayra and Chris, who happens to be a true Miami PD cop, yay! Enjoy!

More pictures on The Print Store.

title.rendered: Andrea + Randy | Engagement Session

content.rendered:
We caught a TORNADO! A mini one, of course. We started off very early in the morning at the Mathenson Hammock Park in Old Cutler Road. The sky looked amazing, but Andrea and Randy made it look even better. What made this session even more special is the fact that Randy proposed to Andrea in this very same place. We had a total blast and hope you enjoy this session as much as we did!

title.rendered: Melina + Kyle | Bridal Shower

content.rendered:
Melina’s aunt hired us to cover this amazing bridal shower as a surprise for her. To our surprise, we knew Kyle from before. Small world! It was an Italian-themed bridal shower, maybe the most detailed one we’ve ever assisted. Everything was beautiful, from the decorations to the food to the gourgeous views of the golf courses. Even from his Italian background, Italo approved the food! Yummy! Enjoy the pictures and congratulations to the future bride and groom. You make a beautiful couple!

title.rendered: Ruth + Joel | Engagement Session

content.rendered:
Last Sunday we did another early morning engagement (6:30AM mind you), this time in Miami’s South Pointe park. It’s so different to take pictures at that time in the summer. The weather is fresher, less crowds and more pictures! But either way, by the end of the session, it was so hot Ruth and Joel ended up getting soaked…literally!

content.rendered:

title.rendered: Denise + Orlando | Wedding

content.rendered:
Last night we had the opportunity to do Denise and Orlando’s wedding in Miami’s 94th Aero Squadron Restaurant. The location had a spectacular view facing Miami Airport’s airplane runway. It was a very intimate wedding, with their friends and family present. Congratulations guys!

title.rendered: Noris + Ramon | Miami Beach After Wedding Session

content.rendered: Noris and Ramon have been married for over a year now, and they weren’t quite ready to put away their wedding attire, at least not until now. Noris was totally up to trash the dress in Miami Beach! And not only did they want an after wedding session, but also a portrait session to go with it in Miami’s Design District. It was so much fun and refreshing to get in the water and stroll through the city. Enjoy!

title.rendered: Katie + Matt | Engagement Session

content.rendered:
What can we say…It was a steamy day!! Not even these two firefighters could have stopped this crazy South Florida heat! But despite the weather, we had an amazing time with Katie and Matt. It was our first time shooting firefighters and it turned out to be one of our favorite engagement sessions. Congrats to you two, you guys make an extraordinary couple! Enjoy your pictures. Here are some of our favorites…

title.rendered: Dolores + Claudio | Anniversary

content.rendered: It was so different for us to not do an engagement or a wedding for once, but rather a couple that’s been together for 28 years and formed a family with 6 kids. It was a very special anniversary photo session, not only for the time they have been together and the love they still show each other, but rather because they’re my own parents (Ale’s). Happy anniversary, we’re so happy for you both!

title.rendered: Vanessa + Jonathan | After Wedding Session

content.rendered: We had the pleasure of shooting Vanessa and Jonathan’s after wedding session in downtown Miami. Both being true artists, they were very easy to lead creativity and we had tons of fun shooting their pictures in Miami’s suburb streets. We hit Bayside afterwards, which is Miami’s most turistic shopping plaza with live music and great food. Thanks for such a wonderful time!

title.rendered: Janel + Esteban | Deerfield Beach Engagement

content.rendered: It was the first time waking up at 5 AM to do a sunrise engagement session – everything for you guys! Even though it was cloudy, it worked out for the best. We took the pictures at Deerfield Beach, in a very nice location by a fishing pier. We can’t even describe how much fun we had with these two!
